title: elymus hirsutus
intro: Elymus hirsutus, also known as hairy wildrye, is a perennial grass species native to North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Elymus hirsutus include reducing inflammation, soothing skin irritations, and supporting respiratory health. Elymus hirsutus can be prepared into teas, tinctures, and infusions, making it a versatile herb for various herbal remedies.
